description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:latest Docker image with a postgres:latest service and a pip cache at ~/.cache/pip/. Define a single test stage with a job named test that runs the global before_script commands python -V and pip install -r requirements.txt, then executes python manage.py test --noinput --settings app.settings.ci. Set a top-level variable POSTGRES_DB=owc and a job-level variable DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@postgres:5432/$POSTGRES_DB. No special rules; the job runs on every pipeline.
